text.description: Narrative text card for summaries, agent responses, or explanations.
text.when: Always available as fallback; prefer richer components when structured data exists.

highlight_box.description: Prominent coloured callout for critical status messages or safety warnings.
highlight_box.when: safety_passed=false → variant=error; intent=exit → variant=success; any top-level alert.

statistic_grid.description: Compact grid of 2–4 headline numbers shown at a glance.
statistic_grid.when: recognition: total calories, protein, fat, carbs from macro_totals. recommendation: restaurant count, avg rating.

key_value_list.description: Labelled rows of facts for detailed breakdowns.
key_value_list.when: Per-food nutrient detail; per-restaurant meta (address, cuisine, hours).

props.title: string (optional)
props.items: [{label, value, highlight}] — highlight=true bolds the row

bar_chart.description: Horizontal bar chart comparing values across items.
bar_chart.when: Calorie comparison across detected foods; dish calorie comparison across restaurants.

props.title: string (optional)
props.colors: [string] (optional) — CSS colour per bar; auto-assigned if omitted

macro_chart.description: SVG donut chart + bar breakdown for protein / carb / fat macronutrients.
macro_chart.when: recognition intent and nutrition_facts has protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g data.

calorie_ring.description: Full-circle SVG ring showing calories consumed vs daily target. Shows kcal remaining in centre.
calorie_ring.when: recognition or meal-tracking intent when a calorie target or consumed total is known.

health_score_card.description: SVG semicircle gauge showing an overall health score 0–100 with letter grade and optional dimension breakdown bars.
health_score_card.when: recognition intent when an overall meal/food healthiness score can be derived. Score = 100 × (healthy_foods / total_foods) if no explicit score.

props.title: string (optional)
props.dimensions: [{label, value, max, variant}] (optional) — e.g. Sugar Level: 70/100 warning

nutrient_gauge.description: One or more mini SVG semicircle gauges showing a nutrient value vs its daily limit. Colour auto-sets: green < 60%, amber 60–80%, red ≥ 80%.
nutrient_gauge.when: recognition intent to highlight risky nutrients: sodium, sugar, saturated fat. Use gauges list for multiple at once.

props.title: string (optional)
props.gauges: [{label, value, limit, unit, variant}] — variant overrides auto-colour
props.label: string (single gauge mode — use only if gauges is absent)

nutrition_label.description: FDA/HPB-style Nutrition Facts panel for one food item with % Daily Values.
nutrition_label.when: recognition intent with a single dominant food, or when user explicitly asks for label-style breakdown.

food_health_list.description: Per-food health assessment rows: name, macros, calorie count, health badge, caution reasons.
food_health_list.when: recognition intent — one entry per detected food in nutrition_facts.

props.title: string (optional)
props.items: [{name, calories, is_healthy, reasons, protein_g, fat_g, carb_g}]

restaurant_list.description: Rich restaurant cards: name, rating/price/distance chips, cuisine, top dishes with health dots.
restaurant_list.when: recommendation intent — one card per restaurant in recommended_restaurants.

props.title: string (optional)
props.items: [{name, rating, price, distance, is_veg, cuisine, dishes:[{name, calories, is_healthy}]}]

ranking_list.description: Ranked list with medal badges (🥇🥈🥉) for top 3, numbered for the rest.
ranking_list.when: recommendation intent: rank restaurants by rating or healthiest dishes by calorie/health score.

props.title: string (optional)
props.items: [{name, value, unit, sub, badge_text}] — value is the ranked metric

tip_card.description: Styled actionable nutrition tip: large emoji icon, bold title, body text. Tone-aware background colour.
tip_card.when: Append 1–2 personalised tips at end of recognition or recommendation layouts.

meal_summary_row.description: Grid of 2–4 meal slots (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner/Snack) each with icon, name, calories, and mini bar.
meal_summary_row.when: When meal_plans data is available with per-meal calorie breakdown, or to summarise a multi-meal day.

props.title: string (optional)
props.meals: [{name, icon, calories, color}] — icon is emoji

comparison_table.description: Multi-column table comparing nutrients across several foods.
comparison_table.when: recognition with ≥3 foods: columns=[Food, Calories, Protein, Fat, Sugar].

progress_bar.description: Single progress bar for goal tracking.
progress_bar.when: Show calorie intake vs daily goal; sugar vs limit.

tabs.description: Tabbed sections for multi-day meal plans or categorised info.

tag_list.description: Pill badges for cuisine types, dietary flags, or food categories.
tag_list.when: Show cuisine tags, vegan/low-sugar flags, or food category labels.

columns.description: Renders two or more sections side by side in a flex row. Each child section becomes its own card at equal width. Use to make better use of horizontal space.
columns.when: Place two complementary visual components side by side: e.g. calorie_ring + macro_chart, health_score_card + nutrient_gauge, bar_chart + ranking_list.

props.sections: [section objects] — each has a 'type' and its own props
props.gap: number (optional) — pixel gap between columns, default 12

divider.when: Separate logically distinct blocks in a long layout.
